overall.description: A cinematic game engine rendering of a medieval great hall resembling the Harry Potter dining hall, featuring floating candles, long wooden tables filled with seated figures, and large stained glass windows. The camera maintains a steady elevated view of the atmospheric candlelit interior with stone architecture.

segments.scene_description: The video presents a static elevated view of a grand medieval dining hall with gothic architecture. Hundreds of floating candles illuminate the space above long wooden tables where numerous people are seated. Large stained glass windows line the right wall showing the night sky outside, while a large fireplace burns on the left wall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, elevated perspective of a grand medieval dining hall, capturing the atmospheric glow of a candlelit gothic interior. It begins with a wide view of the cavernous space, where hundreds of floating candles cast a warm light over long wooden tables filled with seated figures. As the camera lingers, the gaze encompasses the contrasting elements of the room, from the flickering warmth of a large fireplace on the left to the cool tones of the night sky visible through stained glass windows on the right. The scene remains poised in this cinematic stillness, emphasizing the scale of the stone architecture and the mystical ambiance of the gathering.
